name: Summers End Stew
recipeIngredient: 8 to 12 Fresh Tomatoes, peeled and cut up
4 to 6 Med. Potatoes, peeled and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown the meat in oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add tomatoes, tomato juice or water, onions, garlic, pepper, and salt (if desired). Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
4. Add potatoes, carrots, corn, green beans, peas, and celery. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add squash and simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes or until meat and vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in parsley and sugar.
Yield: 16 Servings
Diabetic Exchanges: One cup without added salt equals 1 meat, 1 starch, 2 vegetables; also 189 Calories, 170 mg sodium, 32 mg cholesterol, 22 mg carbohydrate, 13 gm protein, 6 gm fat.
